name: Ophir High Conviction Fund
analysis: OPH's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.7800. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.8100, stop A$2.5047, target A$3.1400 (1.08:1) — then trail it.
